title: A new iterative multi-step method for solving nonlinear equation
author: Usman, Iqbal, et al.

steps.title: Method details
steps.instruction: In this section, we introduce a novel iterative method for solving nonlinear equations that eliminates the need for higher-order derivatives. Additionally, we analyze the convergence properties of the proposed approach to establish its theoretical foundation.

steps.title: Method details
steps.instruction: Algorithm 2.1. For a given initial approximation x0, compute the approximation solution xn+1 by the iterative schemes:yn=xn−f(xn)f′(xn),zn=yn−f(xn)f(yn)f′(xn)(f(xn)−2f(yn)),tn=zn−f(zn)f[zn,yn](1−(f(yn))2(f(xn))2)(1−2((f(yn))3(f(xn))3+f(zn)f(xn)))xn+1=tn−f(tn)f[tn,zn](1−Hn)−Qn−Pn−Mn.

steps.title: Method details
steps.instruction: In the next result, we present the convergence of Algorithm 2.1.
